phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si paga, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PAH-gah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the cash register, on the right.

responses.english: At the cash register, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Come posso ordinare da asporto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-meh POS-soh or-dee-NAH-reh dah ah-SPOR-toh, pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Lo dica alla cassa prima di pagare.
likely_response.pronunciation: LOH DEE-kah AHL-lah KAH-ssah PREE-mah DEE pah-GAH-reh
likely_response.translation_en: Tell them at the register before paying.

responses.english: Tell them at the register before paying.
responses.phonetic: LOH DEE-kah AHL-lah KAH-ssah PREE-mah DEE pah-GAH-reh
responses.french: Lo dica alla cassa prima di pagare.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un caffè al banco?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh KOH-stah oon kahf-FEH al BAHN-koh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated in the menu.

responses.english: It is indicated in the menu.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudete, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh, ah kay OR-ah kyoo-DAY-tay, payr fah-VOR-ay

likely_response.local: Chiudiamo alle diciannove e trenta tutti i giorni.
likely_response.pronunciation: kee-oo-dee-AH-moh AHL-leh dee-chee-ahn-NOH-veh EH TREHN-tah TOOT-tee EE jee-OHR-nee
likely_response.translation_en: We close at seven thirty every day.

responses.english: We close at seven thirty every day.
responses.phonetic: kee-oo-dee-AH-moh AHL-leh dee-chee-ahn-NOH-veh EH TREHN-tah TOOT-tee EE jee-OHR-nee
responses.french: Chiudiamo alle diciannove e trenta tutti i giorni.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il mandolato veronese?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KWAN-toh KOS-tah eel man-doh-LAH-toh veh-roh-NEH-zeh

likely_response.translation_en: It costs twenty euros per kilo.

responses.english: It costs twenty euros per kilo.
